# kSecTrustOrganizationName

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is the organization name field of the subject of the leaf certificate.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecTrustOrganizationName: CFString
```

## Discussion

The value is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFString] that is meant to be displayed to the user as the validated name of the company or entity that owns the certificate, but only if the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecTrustExtendedValidation] key is present.
title: kSecTrustOrganizationName
